name: cashsnap_webgl_clean_base_curriculum_probe_v1
description: One-recipe ablation suite for the 512-image clean WebGL curriculum root. Local model probe only; does not promote the root into the main trainable-candidate suite.

recipes.intended_use: Clean all-class replay/curriculum probe before overlap, fan, or hand stress is staged.
recipes.promotion_gate: clean real holdout and rare/high-value classes do not regress versus matched p24 real-only control
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs one-seed clean-checkpoint ablation, then seed stability before any broader use.
